title: ranunculus sessiliflorus var. pilulifer
intro: Ranunculus sessiliflorus var. pilulifer is a flowering plant, also known as the yellow water buttercup, a variant of the Ranunculus sessiliflorus species. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ranunculus sessiliflorus var. pilulifer include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a potential natural remedy for various skin issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or ointments, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
